sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, bitmap_col AggregateFunction(bitmapUnion, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([2, 3, 4]));
UPDATE test_table SET bitmap_col = bitmapUnion(bitmap_col, bitmapBuild([5])) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmap_col) AS res FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmap_col) AS res FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
